sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: Level 3 has a completely different layout. There are vertical columns separated by black bars, with white regions that can be moved up/down. Light blue 2x2 blocks at the bottom (rows 56-57) are the interactive elements. Colored markers (charcoal, yellow, purple, light green) indicate target positions. Need to probe to understand mechanics.
Goal model: Move white regions to match target positions indicated by colored markers.
Plan: Probe by clicking a light blue block to see what happens.

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Probe: click the leftmost light blue block at (56, 12)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 56, 'col': 12}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
